title: What is Synthetic Data and Dataset Creation?
summary: Synthetic data generation is the LLM-driven creation of high-quality, diverse, labeled training examples that solve scarcity, privacy, and cost problems, when properly curated, mixed with real data, and validated against downstream task performance.
use_when: User asks for the definition, scope, or purpose of Synthetic Data and Dataset Creation.

title: 30-70% of 2026 frontier training data is synthetic — your pipeline must treat ge
summary: Treat synthetic data generators as versioned artifacts; do not assume a universal synthetic-data percentage without source verification.
use_when: User asks a practical or factual question about Synthetic Data and Dataset Creation.

title: The 5-step pipeline (chunk → context → query → evolution → label + verify) is th
summary: The 5-step pipeline (chunk → context → query → evolution → label + verify) is the industry standard.
